task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Oscar EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR dashboard or schedule interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., user 'oscardoc' is logged in).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the schedule for Dr. Sarah Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The schedule view is open and displays the calendar specifically for Dr. Sarah Chen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located Robert Thornton's 10:00 AM appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment block for 'Robert Thornton' at 10:00 AM is visible on the schedule.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the appointment details or status update menu for Robert Thornton.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box, popup, or edit screen for Robert Thornton's 10:00 AM appointment is open.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the 'No Show' (N) status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status dropdown, radio button, or selection field is set to 'No Show' or 'N' in the appointment details.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment remains on the schedule and is marked as a No Show.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main schedule view shows Robert Thornton's 10:00 AM appointment still present, but with a visual indicator of 'No Show' (e.g., an 'N' icon, specific color coding, or status text).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oscar EMR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the web browser/EMR interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts to update the database.

integrity.description: Verify the status was updated within the EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The status change occurs in the actual Oscar EMR appointment window, not by editing HTML via developer tools.

integrity.description: Verify the appointment was not deleted to simulate a no-show.
integrity.visual_evidence: The appointment block for Robert Thornton must still exist on the schedule, not be removed entirely.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Robert Thornton. Appointment Time: 10:00 AM. Provider: Dr. Sarah Chen (provider_no: 999998). Expected Status: 'N' (No Show). The appointment must remain on the schedule but be marked with status code 'N'.
